title: MC: Xbox One Edition
description: Experience Minecraft in your Xbox One (pc) With the game you know and love playable on a new piece of hardware!
body:
Minecraft Xbox One Edition is a blocky universe for your PC! With infinite worlds to explore, caves to venture and friends to play with, you can grab that controller of yours and play with ease!

Warning!: Legacy4J may get you banned with servers with anticheat due to changes for controller and stuff! I am not at fault if you get warned, kicked or banned!

Main inclusions of the pack:

Legacy 4J

Legacy Skins

Minimega

Thanks too:
[Inkboi for helping with testing](https://modrinth.com/user/inkboi)

[The developers of Reconsole resources for the original texture pack of rcr (version is modified in mod)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/re-console-resources)

[The developers of Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j)

And the developers of any mods and textures i havent mentioned!
